---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Catherine Echendu</h1>
    <p class="hero-hook">Before dashboards, I owned the number.</p>
    <p class="hero-value">I build customer and revenue intelligence for teams that need churn, retention and commercial performance translated into clear decisions.</p>
    <a href="#work" class="cta-button">See my work</a>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="proof-strip full-width" id="proof">
  <div class="proof-inner">
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Commercial background</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">FCA-regulated fintech · Head of Business Development · Revenue ownership · Campaign ROI</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Built evidence</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">Workforce analytics project · SQL validation · Power BI · R · Governance</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-row">
      <span class="proof-label">Building next</span>
      <span class="proof-chips">Customer &amp; Revenue Intelligence · Churn · Funnel · Hypothesis testing · Automation</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
